apps.name: AI Song Cover Studio
default_review_notes: No account sign-in is required. Reviewers can import a song file from Files and record or import a voice reference, then generate a free 30-second preview.
The Pro subscription com.xmaillc.aisongcover.monthly is $4.99/month and enables renders up to 5 minutes.
AI processing is performed by the developer's own private/local model service. User audio is not sent to third-party AI model providers or third-party AI APIs.
The app purchase flow includes functional links to Privacy Policy and Terms of Use.
